intelligence.title: React2Shell RCE (CVE-2025-66478) — CVSS 10.0, actively exploited by nation-state actors
intelligence.detail: Critical RCE in React Server Components Flight protocol. Unauthenticated single HTTP request executes arbitrary code. China-nexus threat groups exploiting within hours of disclosure. Fixed in Next.js 16.0.7.

intelligence.title: Next.js DoS + Source Code Exposure (CVE-2025-55184, CVE-2025-55183, CVE-2025-67779)
intelligence.detail: Two additional RSC vulns. DoS infinite loop + source code leak. Initial fix incomplete. Fixed in Next.js 16.0.10.

intelligence.title: Next.js RSC DoS via memory exhaustion (CVE-2026-23864) — CVSS 7.5
intelligence.detail: Disclosed Jan 26 2026. Circular references cause infinite serialization. Fixed in Next.js 16.0.11 and 16.1.5.

intelligence.title: Node.js 22 security release — 3 High, 4 Medium fixes
intelligence.detail: Node.js 22.22.0 fixes HTTP/2 crash DoS, buffer allocation memory leak, symlink bypass.

intelligence.title: Prisma 7 — Rust-free client, 3x faster queries, 90% smaller bundles
intelligence.detail: TypeScript-native client replaces Rust engine. Breaking changes: driver adapters, config file, import paths. v7.4 adds query caching.

intelligence.title: Next.js 16.1 — Turbopack FS caching, React Compiler stable
intelligence.detail: Non-breaking upgrade from 16.0. FS caching, React Compiler auto-memoization, 20MB smaller installs.

intelligence.title: AWS Lambda now bills for cold start INIT phase — costs up 10-50%
intelligence.detail: Effective Aug 2025. Prisma client initialization is a known bottleneck. Prisma 7's 90% smaller bundles could offset.

intelligence.title: Elasticsearch LZ4 library info disclosure (ESA-2026-07)
intelligence.detail: CVE-2025-66566. Crafted compressed input reads previous buffer contents. Fixed in ES 8.19.10, 9.1.10, 9.2.4.

intelligence.title: Agent frameworks converging on graph-based execution and MCP
intelligence.detail: CrewAI, AutoGen v0.4, LangGraph all adopting graph/workflow execution. MCP becoming standard for agent-tool integration.

intelligence.title: Price scraping market shifting to AI-powered extraction
intelligence.detail: Web scraping market growing to $8.6B by 2032. AI extraction achieving 99.5% accuracy.

intelligence.title: Claude Code MCP: lazy loading cuts context 95%, HTTP hooks
intelligence.detail: MCP Tool Search lazy loading, HTTP hooks, memory leak fixes for long sessions.

proposed_initiatives.title: Node.js 22.22.0 Security Update Across All Runtimes

summary: Critical security situation: four Next.js RSC vulnerabilities (including CVSS 10.0 React2Shell) and eight Node.js CVEs require immediate patching. Prisma 7 offers 3x speedup and 90% smaller bundles that offset new Lambda INIT billing.
